description.zh-Hans: 无需手动搭建发射器、模拟器和渲染器即可生成火焰、烟雾、天气、魔法与环境粒子。
description.en: Creates complete fire, smoke, weather, magic and ambient particle effects without manual wiring.

triggers.zh-Hans: 一键粒子, 火焰特效, 烟雾特效, 下雨下雪, 魔法粒子
triggers.en: one node particles, fire vfx, smoke vfx, rain, snow, magic particles
